overall.description: First-person exploration through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night in a video game. The player walks along elevated walkways and streets, passing towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage. The environment features wet concrete surfaces, urban decay, and futuristic architecture with heavy cyan and magenta lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow elevated walkway bordered by concrete barriers and industrial buildings

teal-colored industrial building facade with metal ventilation grilles
large rectangular metal ventilation grilles on the building wall
distant neon signs and holographic displays visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow elevated walkway in a cyberpunk city. Concrete barriers with vertical slits line the left side while a cyan industrial building with ventilation grilles occupies the right. The path is littered with debris and trash, leading toward distant neon lights visible through the corridor opening.

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens to reveal a stunning panoramic view of the cyberpunk city skyline. The camera approaches the edge where a concrete railing provides safety over the elevated highway. A red sports car passes by on the road below as the camera pans to showcase towering skyscrapers illuminated with vibrant neon advertisements and holographic displays, including the prominent ORBITAL AIR signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with large digital billboards and stairway access

events.description: camera turns right toward a stairway entrance leading to a lower level

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing large commercial billboards and approaching a stairway entrance

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying romantic couple with AVANTE text
tall billboard featuring a man holding a drink with REAL WATER text
concrete stairway entrance with illuminated steps leading downward

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with massive digital billboards, including the prominent AVANTE romance advertisement and a REAL WATER beverage billboard. The concrete barrier returns to the left side as the path continues past a stairway entrance leading to lower levels, with the environment transitioning from open skyline to more enclosed urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass beneath elevated highway with support pillars and stairway access

events.description: entering darker underpass area beneath the elevated highway with concrete support columns

agents.ego_description: exploring the dimly lit underpass area, approaching a concrete stairway while navigating around support pillars

massive concrete support columns holding up the elevated highway above
piles of garbage bags and debris accumulated under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a darker, semi-enclosed underpass beneath the elevated highway. Massive concrete support pillars dominate the space, with piles of trash bags visible in the corners. The camera approaches a wide concrete stairway with integrated lighting, leading upward while the environment becomes more industrial and shadowed, illuminated only by artificial lights and distant neon glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow industrial corridor into a sprawling neon metropolis before descending into a shadowed urban underpass. It begins by moving through a cramped elevated walkway lined with concrete barriers and ventilation grilles, passing through debris toward a distant glow. As the path opens, the camera reaches a railing to reveal a panoramic skyline of towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, including the Orbital Air signage, while a red sports car speeds along the highway below. The scene then shifts toward a commercial sidewalk dominated by massive digital billboards for Avante and Real Water, moving past a stairway entrance as the open vista gives way to enclosed infrastructure. Finally, the camera enters a dark underpass beneath the highway, passing massive concrete support pillars and piles of trash before approaching a lit stairway that leads upward into the industrial gloom.
